g.text: All sent to Bedrock in one call
• All context is plain text, not embeddings
• Files loaded in full (up to 50K tokens)
• Stored in S3 with metadata in DDB
• Types: MD, HTML, SVG, Code, React
HOW CONTEXT IS ASSEMBLED FOR EACH REQUEST
If too long, summarize old messages
Claude's 200K context window makes this text-only approach possible without vector search
